channel.title: Sora on RockB
channel.description: Recent content in Sora on RockB

item.title: Best AI Video Generators in 2026: Veo 3 vs Runway vs Kling After Sora
item.description: Sora is shutting down. The best AI video generators in 2026 are Veo 3.1 for quality and native audio, Runway Gen-4 for professional workflows, and Kling 3.0 for value.
